searchTitle: Search projects by title or filter by category
title: Projects
subtitle: My recent work

sasGalileo.title: SAS — Sistemas Galileo
sasGalileo.overviewDetails: Develop, enhance, and maintain a suite of enterprise web applications used across the organization. Responsibilities span frontend development in AngularJS, backend APIs in NodeJS, database optimization on Oracle, and infrastructure deployment using GitLab, AWS and Docker.
keyContributions: Built and maintained AngularJS frontend modules and RESTful NodeJS APIs, improving feature delivery across users meeting and stakeholders.
Integrate LDAP for centralized user management and access control.
Analyzed and optimized heavy Oracle SQL queries, stored procedures, packages, and scheduled jobs — reducing critical report generation times significantly.
Implemented ETL pipelines using Neo4j Aura for graph-based data transformation and reporting.
Managed application deployments through GitLab CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, and AWS infrastructure.
Introduced AI-assisted test case generation to improve QA and building quality software through prompt engineering.

hrVendorPG.title: HR Vendor — Procter & Gamble
hrVendorPG.tags: ASP.NET / C# / Javascript / JQuery / SQL Server
hrVendorPG.overviewDetails: Worked remotely on a engineering team at P&G, developing and maintaining enterprise-grade internal web tool used across business units. Focus areas included .NET backend development, SQL Server database management, and frontend enhancements with JavaScript, JQuery and AJAX.
keyContributions: Developed and enhanced enterprise web applications in ASP.NET, C#, and JavaScript, implementing new features based on evolving business user requirements.
Analyzed and rewrote complex SQL Server stored procedures, reducing query execution time and improving overall application performance and system reliability.
Created and maintained SQL Server jobs, tables, and procedures to support automated reporting and data processing pipelines used by global operations teams.

bbop.title: Bbop — 5050 Capital
bbop.overviewDetails: Built frontend development for a fintech web platform, building reusable React component library, integrating REST APIs, and implementing authentication flows. Worked closely with designers to translate Figma mockups into responsive, production-ready layouts using Tailwind CSS.
keyContributions: Built a scalable applicationy in ReactJS using hooks and Redux, managing states, enabling consistent UI patterns across the platform and accelerating feature development.
Implemented REST API integrations using NodeJS, ExpressJS, and Sequelize, and added OAuth / JWT authentication and authorization to secure user sessions.
Translated Figma designs into pixel-perfect, fully responsive layouts with Tailwind CSS, ensuring a seamless user experience across devices.
Collaborated closely with UX/UI designers to iterate on design implementations and optimize for performance and accessibility.
Provided support through GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines to automate testing and deployment.
Collaborated in a Scrum team using Jira for sprint planning, contributing to story grooming, estimations, and retrospectives throughout an 18-month project lifecycle.
